title: Genetically prioritized mitochondrial regulators of advanced renal failure: multi-omic Mendelian randomization and biological plausibility assessment in allograft fibrosis.
abstract:
Genetically prioritized mitochondrial regulators of advanced renal failure: 
multi-omic Mendelian randomization and biological plausibility assessment in 
allograft fibrosis.
query: chronic kidney disease multi-omics integration GWAS eQTL

ml_recommendations.rationale: Multi-block integration: MOFA+ or SNF latent factors as features, then standard classifier. Late fusion (train per-modality, vote) is robust when sample sizes differ across modalities. Early concatenation + LASSO is a strong baseline.
